WESTERN NORTH ATLANTIC.
TURKS AND CAICOS ISLANDS.
DNC 16.
DISTRESS SIGNAL RECEIVED ON 406 MHZ FROM
88 FOOT VESSEL TROPICAL JET IN
21-33.0N 072-16.9W. VESSELS IN VICINITY
REQUESTED TO KEEP A SHARP LOOKOUT,
ASSIST IF POSSIBLE.
REPORTS TO RCC MIAMI,
PHONE: 305 415 6800,
